first1_hint: Tap ✓ Know on your very first word — the journey begins!
words50_hint: Learn 50 words — you’re a Padawan now! About 1% of the dictionary.
words100_hint: 100 words — you can already read simple texts!
words250_hint: 250 words cover 65% of everyday speech. The Force is with you!
words500_hint: 500 words — the level of a confident Jedi Knight!
words1000_hint: 1000 words = A2/B1. You understand movies with subtitles!
words2000_hint: 2000 words — you speak fluently. Worthy of the Council!
words3000_hint: 3000 words — C1 level, almost a Sith Lord of vocabulary!
words4000_hint: 4000 words — you are the Chosen One. You read without a dictionary!
words5542_hint: All 8327 words learned. Do or do not — there is no try!
streak3_hint: Practice 3 days in a row — a habit begins!
streak7_hint: 7 days in a row — a true Jedi never gives up!
streak14_hint: 14 days — you train like in the Jedi Temple now!
streak30_hint: 30 days — you did it. The Jedi Council applauds!
streak100_hint: 100 days in a row. The Force has become part of you.
goal1_hint: Complete your daily goal — learn the set number of words in a day
goal7_hint: Complete the daily goal 7 times (not necessarily in a row)
speed20_hint: Learn 20 words in a single session
speed50_hint: 50 words in one session — like a hyperjump!
mode_quiz50_hint: 50 quizzes. Mind sharp as a Jedi blade!
mode_tempo10_hint: 10 timed games. Speed is your weapon!
mode_write1_hint: Type your first word by hand. A Padawan’s penmanship!
mode_listen1_hint: Finish your first Listen mode round
mode_story1_hint: Finish your first story in Reading+ mode
mode_daily1_hint: Complete your first daily mission — 10 words against the clock!
mode_spelling1_hint: Finish your first Spelling Bee round — hear it and spell it
combo5_hint: Answer correctly 5 times in a row without mistakes
combo10_hint: 10 correct answers in a row — Jedi reflexes!
combo25_hint: 25 in a row. The Force guides you through every word
lvl4_hint: Reach the Jedi Knight level (250 words)
lvl5_hint: Reach the Jedi Master level (500 words)
lvl6_hint: Reach the Council Member level (900 words)
lvl7_hint: Reach the Sith Lord level (1500 words)
lvl8_hint: Reach The Chosen One level (2500 words)
lvl9_hint: Reach the Force Balancer level (4000 words)
mode_adaptive1_hint: Finish your first Adaptive Quiz round — difficulty adjusts to you
mode_adaptive10_hint: 10 adaptive quizzes. The analysis droid knows you well now!
mode_allmodes_hint: Finish at least one round of every game mode
mistakes_fixed10_hint: Fix 10 hard words in the Mistake Review screen
mistakes_fixed50_hint: 50 fixed mistakes. No bug can stand against you!
lang2_hint: Learn at least one word in two different languages at once
lang3_hint: Three languages at once — a true Galactic Polyglot!
lang5_hint: Five languages at once. The Force of languages is with you!
duel_win50_hint: 50 wins. You're a legend of the arena!
duel_streak3_hint: Win 3 Duels in a row without a loss
duel_streak5_hint: 5 wins in a row. No opponent can stand against you!
